blocker.summary: The repo already starts at a zero-.py baseline, so the lane can only preserve and enforce the migrated state.

notes: The listed BIG-GO-1135 candidate Python files are already absent in this checkout.

Benchmark, e2e, migration, and root-script replacement entrypoints already exist in Go or shell form, so this lane adds issue-scoped enforcement and refreshed evidence rather than new runtime migration code.
